creator: exploringlondon
caption: The ceilings though, wow 😱😍 This is a Grade II listed building on the National Heritage List and within is the ornate Victoria Hall, a gorgeous and rare example of this Edwardian style. It was constructed in 1903 and opened in 1906 and it’s free to go and see ✨

transcription.text: I already gave you the time and the place So don't be shy Just come be the man I need Tell me you got something to give I want it I kinda like it when you call me Wonderful Whatever the type of talk you do
